title: DHSC registers of board members' interests
body: "The Department of Health and Social Care (DHSC) maintains a register of departmental board members’ interests.  These lists set out declared interests of executive and non-executive members of the DHSC board.  The interests of officials and non-executive board members who were members of the board or non-ministerial board and who were appointed before November 2024 are published in the department’s annual reports and accounts.  "
